channel.title: Ripgrep on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Ripgrep on Arrans github.io

item.title: BurntSushi/ripgrep
item.description: ripgrep recursively searches directories for a regex pattern while respecting your gitignore

item.title: Genivia/ugrep
item.description: 🔍 ugrep 7.2 file pattern searcher – a more powerful, ultra fast, user-friendly, compatible grep replacement. Includes a TUI, Google-like Boolean search with AND/OR/NOT, fuzzy search, hexdumps, searches (nested) archives (zip, 7z, tar, pax, cpio), compressed files (gz, Z, bz2, lzma, xz, lz4, zstd, brotli), pdfs, docs, and more
